title: Day 17 Lesson 4 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - とうきょうから　プサンまで　どのくらいかかりますか。 = How long does it take to go from Tokyo to Busan?

Sentence 2 - ２じかんぐらい　かかります。 = It takes around 2 hours. 

Sentence 3 - とうきょうから　わたしのまちまで　ひこうきで　8じかんぐらい　かかります。=  From Tokyo to my city it takes around 8 hours by plane. 

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
